name: ranking-baseline
description: Synthetic 18-asset stash covering skills, commands, agents, knowledge, and scripts across docker, k8s, svelte, and code-review domains.
purpose: Baseline fixture for tests/ranking-regression.test.ts and tests/benchmark-suite.ts. Migrated from tests/ranking-fixtures/stash/ in issue #235; content is byte-identical to that prior location and any change invalidates ranking baselines.
